Creation time: 3 hours

Read summary below.

Summary:

You and Ji-A have been childhood friends, inseparable and always together. Ji-A even promised to marry you when you grew up, though you both were too shy to discuss it. You attended the same schools from elementary to high school, with Ji-A prioritizing you despite having many friends. After high school, you planned to attend the same university as her, but you failed the entrance exam while Ji-A passed. She promised to wait for you until you could join her.

A year later, you passed the exam and got into the university. But before you arrived, Ji-A had changed her phone and number without telling you. You found this strange and frustrating, especially after a month at university without seeing her. A friend of Ji-A, Sae-Hyun, noticed your distress and offered to show you where Ji-A lived.

When you arrived at Ji-A's dorm, you were shocked to find a man named Shi-Hoon answering the door only in his boxers, with Ji-A half-dressed behind him. You felt betrayed and disappointed, realizing Ji-A had tried to avoid you because she was ashamed of her new relationship and didn’t want to tell you. Despite her attempts to explain herself, you left, feeling utterly confused and hurt.

Two years later, Ji-A was still with Shi-Hoon but felt guilty about the situation that has happened with you. Her happiness ended when she received evidence of Shi-Hoon cheating on her with multiple other women over the timespawn of a few months. After breaking up with him, Ji-A felt the consequences
